report.summary: Cycle-close Apr 1: 435 uncommitted files (+15 from Mar 29), Day 7 without deploy. 1,235 page.tsx on disk (+2), 606 published slugs (+23), 103 missing page.tsx (-2). 147 TS errors stable. All 6 API routes code-healthy with proper caching. No regressions — deploy remains the singular P0 blocker.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 606 unique published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 583 on Mar 29 — 23 new slugs promoted but invisible to production without deploy)
1,235 page.tsx files on disk (+2 from Mar 29's 1,233). New learn pages scaffolded since last eod.
103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx (down from 105 — 2 resolved). Remaining gaps: wallets/*, investing/best/*, taxes/*, learn/*, blog/*
147 TypeScript errors — UNCHANGED from Mar 29. All non-blocking: 6 learn page JSX issues + structured-data.examples.ts syntax. No new regressions introduced.

12 modified learn pages in working tree (bitcoin-safe-haven, bitgo-ipo, congressional-tokenization, wallet-security, institutional-adoption, katana-perps, layer-3, leveraged-tokens, lido-v3, onchain-order-book, tokenized-funds, learn/[slug]). All page.tsx present on disk.

New untracked pages since Mar 29: ai-agent-frameworks, aptos-blockchain, citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup, cross-chain-intents, crypto-bear-market-investing, crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption — all scaffolded with page.tsx.
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live HTTP 200 status on degen0x.com. Local code audit is clean.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present on disk: prices (CoinGecko, 60s TTL), fear-greed (Alternative.me, 600s TTL), trending (CoinGecko, 300s TTL), market-metrics (CoinGecko+Alt.me, 60s TTL), market-dominance (CoinGecko, 300s TTL), defi-yields (DefiLlama, 300s TTL)
All 6 routes implement in-memory caching with proper Cache-Control headers (s-maxage + stale-while-revalidate). No code changes since Mar 14 — data layer fully stable.

Fallback patterns verified: prices returns stale cache on CoinGecko failure, market-dominance has static FALLBACK_DATA, fear-greed returns stale cache, market-metrics falls back to mock data. defi-yields returns 500 on failure (no stale fallback — minor gap).
7 supporting routes also present: cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe.

CoinGecko free tier still in use — no API key detected. Rate limit risk persists. 3 of 6 core routes hit CoinGecko (prices, trending, market-dominance) plus market-metrics also hits CoinGecko. 4 CoinGecko calls on cold cache could trigger rate limits.
Network egress blocked — unable to verify live API response health or data freshness from sandbox.

sections.title: DevOps
items: HEAD at commit 21aaf5b (Mar 25) — now 7 days stale. This is the longest deploy gap since project inception.
435 uncommitted files (+15 from Mar 29's 420): mix of new learn pages, report files, component updates, OG assets.
Working tree delta: 993 insertions / 595 deletions across 31 tracked files. Major changes: published-pages.ts (+161 lines), NotificationCenter.tsx refactor, learn page data updates.
Production build expected to succeed — TS errors are non-blocking (JSX in unimported example files). No new build-breaking patterns detected.
CRITICAL: 7-day deploy gap means 23 newly published slugs, 6+ new learn pages, UX fixes, and 161 lines of published-pages.ts updates are all blocked from production. Google cannot index any of these.
No Vercel error data accessible from sandbox — would need Vercel dashboard or CLI auth to check deployment logs.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE (Apr 1 total): 2 standup reports generated. 6+ new learn pages scaffolded (ai-agent-frameworks, aptos-blockchain, citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup, cross-chain-intents, crypto-bear-market-investing, crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption). 23 new slugs added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.
DELTA FROM LAST EOD (Mar 29): +15 uncommitted files (420→435), +2 page.tsx (1,233→1,235), +23 published slugs (583→606), -2 missing page.tsx (105→103), TS errors flat at 147, 0 new commits.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P0 — git commit + push (435 files, 7 days stale). P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs. P2 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields has no stale fallback. P4 — 2 blocked queue items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx).
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 0 active items. Queue is clear but 2 blocked items remain noted in comments.
NEEDS JEFE: `git add -A && git commit -m 'batch deploy Apr 1' && git push` — this single command unblocks 606 published slugs, 6+ new learn pages, and UX fixes for production. Day 7 is critical.
